description: Baseline scorecard for the 5-case self-test corpus. CI uses `infermap-bench run --self-test --assert-against <this file>` to catch runner regressions. Tolerance is 1e-4 per metric; if this gate trips, either the scorer pipeline changed (regenerate after review) or the runner has a real bug.

self-test/perfect.notes: Identical schemas; exact-match on every column.

self-test/zero.notes: Perfect negative — nothing expected, nothing predicted.

self-test/mixed.notes: Alias lookups resolve fname→first_name, lname→last_name. The two unmapped columns on each side stay unmapped.

self-test/all_unmapped.notes: Perfect negative — nothing should map and nothing does.

self-test/adversarial.notes: Short abbreviated source columns (code, ref, status) against verbose target columns (order_code, reference_no, state). Engine picks up one fuzzy match and correctly abstains on the other two rather than false-matching. 'Graceful degradation' signal — non-zero but not perfect.
